tasks.title: Memory Page: Connect to real API + add month/year dropdown UI
tasks.detail: Memory page UI sudah dibuat (app/(openclaw)/agent/memory/page.tsx). Todo: (1) Connect ke real API /api/control-center/memory untuk fetch daily memory files, (2) Tambah dropdown UI untuk month/year picker (sekarang baru state-nya aja), (3) Remove mock data, (4) Handle loading/error state dengan proper UI.

tasks.title: Files Page: Connect to real API for content fetching
tasks.detail: Files page UI sudah dibuat (app/(openclaw)/agent/files/page.tsx). Todo: (1) Connect ke real API /api/control-center/files untuk fetch file list, (2) Fetch real file content saat file selected (bukan mock content), (3) Handle loading/error state dengan proper UI.

tasks.title: Fix Kanban board flickering on reload
tasks.detail:
Fix flickering caused by triple fetch conflict (SSE + polling + onerror). Solution: (1) Add debounce with lastFetchRef (min 2s between fetches), (2) Remove loading state flicker - show cached data instead of 'Loading tasks...', (3) Deduplicate SSE + polling triggers. Affected file: app/(openclaw)/agent/tasks/page.tsx

✅ READY FOR REVIEW (2026-03-05): Implemented debounce (2s min), removed loading flicker after first load, silent fail on SSE errors.

tasks.title: Token Usage Tracking per Kanban Task
tasks.detail:
Implement token logging + display di Kanban board: (1) Tambah field tokenUsage di schema task (promptTokens, completionTokens, totalTokens, modelBreakdown), (2) Update API endpoint tasks untuk include tokenUsage, (3) Setiap agent action log token ke task saat create/update, (4) UI Kanban tampilkan badge token count per card, (5) Summary view untuk total token per task + aggregate board.

✅ DONE (2026-03-05):
- Dashboard TokenUsageCard connected to /api/openclaw/token-usage
- **Request count tracking** (18K/model/month = 90K total) — matches Alibaba dashboard
- **Time windows: 5 Hours, Daily, Weekly, Monthly** — matches Alibaba dashboard format
- Time-series tracking dengan entries + timestamp untuk tokens AND requests
- Auto-cleanup entries >90 hari
- Countdown logic: hijau jika remaining >70%, merah jika <30%
- Token usage tracked separately (for internal monitoring)
- Request count tracked for quota limit enforcement

tasks.title: Implement SSE stream + live timestamp ticker pada Kanban Tasks
tasks.detail: Menambahkan endpoint SSE /api/control-center/tasks/stream, event bus tasks-events, publish event pada create/update/delete task, dan ticker 30 detik + polling fallback 10 detik di UI tasks.

tasks.title: Memory Page MVP (read-only): long-term pinned + daily history layout 1/3 list, 2/3 detail
tasks.detail: Bangun 1 halaman Memory: bagian atas Long-term (MEMORY.md) pinned, bagian history harian per bulan/tahun, panel kiri 1/3 list dan kanan 2/3 detail konten daily memory. UI read-only.

tasks.title: Tambahkan filter Memory page: month-year picker + keyword search
tasks.detail: Filter harian berdasarkan bulan+tahun (date picker) dan pencarian keyword di daftar/isi memory harian.

tasks.title: Rancang operating model sub-agent permanen: Builder, UI Guardian, QA Verifier
tasks.detail: ✅ DESIGN COMPLETE. Decisions: (1) Hybrid mode - event-driven sequential for normal, cron-based pipeline for backlog, (2) Builder = Backend+Basic UI (qwen3-coder-plus, 15min), (3) UI Guardian = Frontend Polish (qwen3.5-plus, 10min), (4) QA Verifier = Final Gate (qwen3.5-plus/glm-5, 10min), (5) Spawn threshold: >50 lines or multi-step, (6) Sequential pipeline with immediate handoff. Ready for implementation via sub-tasks.

tasks.title: Sub-Agent: Implement spawn protocol (sessions_spawn config)
tasks.detail:
Implement spawn logic: (1) Threshold check (>50 lines or multi-step → spawn Builder), (2) sessions_spawn config with runtime='subagent', mode='run', timeout=900s, (3) Model selection per role (Builder=qwen3-coder-plus, UI=qwen3.5-plus, QA=qwen3.5-plus/glm-5), (4) Context attachment (roles/[role].md + task-spec.md + relevant files only), (5) Cron 21:00 trigger for Daily Agent Build Progress.

✅ DONE (2026-03-05 21:02):
- Created lib/openclaw/spawn.ts with full spawn protocol
- shouldSpawnSubAgent(): threshold check (>50 lines or multi-step indicators)
- selectRoleForTask(): auto-select builder/ui-guardian/qa-verifier based on task detail
- buildSpawnParams(): generates sessions_spawn config with role-specific timeout/model
- parseHandoff(): extracts JSON handoff from sub-agent output
- getFallbackModel(): rate limit fallback (qwen3-coder-next, glm-5)
- Updated lib/openclaw/index.ts to export spawn module
- Role configs: Builder (15min), UI Guardian (10min), QA Verifier (10min)

tasks.title: Sub-Agent: Implement handoff format (structured JSON output)
tasks.detail: Implement structured handoff: (1) Builder→UI: {filesChanged, logicComplete, testsPass, uiNote}, (2) UI→QA: {designCompliant, responsive, accessibilityPass, changesApplied}, (3) QA→Main: {scopeMatch, regressions, edgeCasesHandled, readyForUser}, (4) Update Kanban status per stage (In Progress: Builder/UI/QA), (5) Store handoff in task comments/history.

tasks.title: Sub-Agent: Implement error handling + retry logic
tasks.detail: Implement error handling: (1) Builder timeout → retry once → escalate to Main Agent, (2) UI Guardian reject → back to Builder (rework with issues list), (3) QA reject → back to Builder or UI based on issue type, (4) Rate limit fallback (qwen3-coder-next if qwen3-coder-plus limited), (5) Human escalation for repeated failures, (6) Update task status + comment on each retry/rework.

tasks.title: Sub-Agent: Create role definition files (roles/*.md)
tasks.detail:
Create role files: (1) roles/builder.md - Backend+Basic UI, qwen3-coder-plus, 15min SLA, basic Tailwind required, (2) roles/ui-guardian.md - Design System audit, accessibility, responsive, visual polish, 10min SLA, (3) roles/qa-verifier.md - Scope validation, regression check, edge cases, 10min SLA. Files ensure consistency across spawns.

✅ DONE (2026-03-05 21:01):
- Created roles/ directory
- roles/builder.md - Backend+UI implementation, qwen3-coder-plus, 15min SLA
- roles/ui-guardian.md - Design system + accessibility audit, qwen3.5-plus, 10min SLA
- roles/qa-verifier.md - Final validation gate, qwen3.5-plus/glm-5, 10min SLA
- All files include: mission, config, responsibilities, requirements, output format (JSON handoff), guardrails, handoff target

tasks.title: Setup Bailian Token Usage Webhook Server for Auto-Logging
tasks.detail: Setup webhook server to automatically log Bailian token usage from OpenClaw completions. Files already created in C:\Users\miftakhul.rizky\.openclaw\hooks\. Todo: (1) Install node-fetch dependency, (2) Test webhook server locally, (3) Configure OpenClaw to POST to webhook after completions, (4) Verify dashboard updates in real-time, (5) Add error handling + retry logic for failed logs.
